center.name: 榆林市
center.summary: 榆林市是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括遗鸥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The gull breeds in several locations in Mongolia (e.g., Galuut Lake, Khukh Lake, and Chukh Lake), two in Kazakhstan, one in Russia, and one in China (Lake Hongjiannao)
